pendingApplications.address: 43A Water Lane Stratford London E15 4NL
pendingApplications.proposal: Installation of internal retractable roller shutter positioned behind the existing shopfront glazing, independent of the existing windows and doors (This application site is a Grade II Listed Building). The proposal concerns internal security measures only, with no alterations to the building?s external appearance. The security measures are needed to mitigate the risk and vulnerability of premises to vandalism and theft. The intention is to maintain the premises in clean and tidy condition, contributing positively to the other properties in the area, helping to prevent vandalism and antisocial activities.
